case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE & REHAB, INC. VS. ROSIE LEE MOORE ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-27-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-17-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE & REHAB, INC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS ROSIE LEE MORRE AND LINDA D. MARTIN ARE NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-17-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE & REHAB, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY STAN STULEOV, VICE PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT ROSIE LEE MOORE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT LINDA MARTIN IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF PRESENTED ONE PROOF OF SERVICE (UNFILED) AT THE OPENNG OF CALENDAR, BUT IT IS DEFECTIVE SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE & REHAB, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MOORE, ROSIE LEE PLAINTIFF DISMISSES THE CASE AGAINST LINDA MARTIN WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
